title: docs: align legal terms with service fee + exclusive-tax pricing
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Fixes ToS §6 Taxes: prices were stated as VAT-inclusive; checkout now adds tax on top (shipped in #12129).
- Discloses the service fee on Pollen purchases and auto top-up in ToS §6.
- Refunds policy: full-purchase refunds include the service fee and tax; partial refunds prorated.
- Adds an always-visible wallet footer line: prices exclude tax, VAT/sales tax added at checkout.
- Drops the trailing period in the Buy tooltip tax note.
- Bumps Updated dates + ToS changelog line.

gist.headline: Keeping the books tidy
gist.blurb: Updated our legal docs and wallet UI to clearly show how taxes and service fees are handled at checkout. Just keeping the hive's paperwork transparent and above board!
gist.summary: Updated the Terms of Service, Refund Policy, and wallet UI to reflect that Pollen purchases are now tax-exclusive and include a service fee at checkout.
gist.impact: Users will now see a clear note in the wallet footer explaining that VAT or sales tax is added at checkout, aligning the UI with our updated legal terms.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, reviewing a long paper receipt or document, while the Nomnom creature happily eats the bottom of the receipt.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reviewing a long paper receipt that the round tan nomnom creature is happily eating. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
